messages.content: You are an OCI troubleshooting specialist with expertise in OKE. Provide diagnostic guidance on cluster, node pool, and worker node issues.
Como criar oke no compartment production?

Para diagnosticar problemas no OCI:

**Verificar estado do recurso:**
```bash
oci <service> <resource> get --id <ocid>
```

**Verificar eventos recentes:**
```bash
oci audit event list \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --start-time $(date -u -d '1 hour ago' +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)
```

**Network Path Check:**
```bash
oci network path-check create \
  --source-id <source-vnic-ocid> \
  --destination-id <dest-vnic-ocid>
```

Doc: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/ContEng/Concepts/contengoverview.htm

```bash
  --destination-id <dest-vnic-ocid>
```

Como configurar oke com scripts de automação?

Para diagnosticar problemas no OCI:

**Verificar estado do recurso:**
```bash
oci <service> <resource> get --id <ocid>
```

**Verificar eventos recentes:**
```bash
oci audit event list \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --start-time $(date -u -d '1 hour ago' +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)
```

**Network Path Check:**
```bash
oci network path-check create \
  --source-id <source-vnic-ocid> \
  --destination-id <dest-vnic-ocid>
```
